top_signals.title: US insurance rulemaker suspends investment risk designations after cyber attack
top_signals.summary: Ratings help determine how much capital insurers must have to meet obligations to policyholders

top_signals.title: Venezuela quakes kill almost 1,500, with millions more in need
top_signals.summary: Facing public outrage at the response by local officials, Venezuela's U.S.-backed interim leader Delcy Rodriguez thanked other countries for the outpouring of aid.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.
